001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import dagger.Binds;
004import dagger.Module;
005import dagger.hilt.InstallIn;
006import dagger.hilt.components.SingletonComponent;
007import javax.inject.Singleton;
008
009@Module
010@InstallIn(SingletonComponent.class)
011public abstract class RepositoryModule {
012
013  @Binds
014  @Singleton
015  public abstract IncubatorRepository bindIncubatorRepository(IncubatorRepositoryImpl impl);
016
017  @Binds
018  @Singleton
019  public abstract BatchRepository bindBatchRepository(BatchRepositoryImpl impl);
020
021  @Binds
022  @Singleton
023  public abstract EggGroupRepository bindEggGroupRepository(EggGroupRepositoryImpl impl);
024
025  @Binds
026  @Singleton
027  public abstract EggRepository bindEggRepository(EggRepositoryImpl impl);
028
029  @Binds
030  @Singleton
031  public abstract CandlingObservationRepository bindCandlingObservationRepository(
032      CandlingObservationRepositoryImpl impl);
033
034  @Binds
035  @Singleton
036  public abstract GoogleAuthRepository bindGoogleAuthRepository(
037      GoogleAuthRepositoryImpl impl);
038
039}
